description: This file contains backend service functions for a recipe management system, including search, creation, updating, review handling, favorites, shopping list, and moderation operations.

classes.name: RecipeSearchRequest
classes.description: Dataclass representing search/filter parameters for recipe search.

methods.name: str _splitlines(items: List[str])
methods.description: Utility to join list of strings into newline-separated string after stripping.

methods.name: Optional[str] _csv(items: Optional[List[str]])
methods.description: Converts list of strings to a comma-separated lowercase string.

methods.name: List[str] _parse_csv(value: Optional[str])
methods.description: Parses comma-separated string into list of stripped strings.

methods.name: Recipe admin_moderate_recipe_flow(db: Session, *, recipe_id: int, status_value: str, moderation_reason: Optional[str])
Favorite favorites_add_flow(db: Session, *, user: User, recipe_id: int)
None favorites_remove_flow(db: Session, *, user: User, recipe_id: int)
Recipe recipe_create_flow(db: Session, *, author: Optional[User], data: dict, user_submitted: bool)
Tuple[Recipe,float,int] recipe_get_detail_flow(db: Session, recipe_id: int, *, include_unapproved: bool = False)
Recipe recipe_update_flow(db: Session, *, recipe_id: int, actor: User, data: dict)
Review reviews_add_or_update_flow(db: Session, *, user: User, recipe_id: int, rating: int, comment: Optional[str])
Tuple[List[Review],int] reviews_list_flow(db: Session, *, recipe_id: int, page: int, page_size: int)
ShoppingListItem shopping_list_add_item_flow(db: Session, *, user: User, ingredient: str, quantity: Optional[str], recipe_id: Optional[int])
None shopping_list_delete_item_flow(db: Session, *, user: User, item_id: int)
ShoppingListItem shopping_list_update_item_flow(db: Session, *, user: User, item_id: int, data: dict)
